22148158.en_literal: I'll go ahead and charge forward!

668580.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
668580.jp_real: 同じ鉄を踏むわけにはいかない！
668580.en_literal: I can't tread the same path!

1006443493.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST
1006443493.jp_real: 以前の俺たちと思わないことだ！
1006443493.en_literal: I can't believe this is the same group we used to be!

885151977.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
885151977.english: The tyranny of Avia ends now!

321799328.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
321799328.jp_real: 攻撃は通用するようだな
321799328.en_literal: Looks like my attacks are effective.

850142819.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST
850142819.jp_real: 何が…起きようとしている…

132170497.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
132170497.jp_real: 勝てぬ相手ではないはずだ
132170497.en_literal: There's no opponent I can't defeat!
132170497.english: There is no foe we cannot topple!

884875452.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
884875452.jp_real: まだだ！隙を見て畳み掛けるんだ！
884875452.en_literal: I'm not done yet! I'll take advantage of the opening and sweep you away!
884875452.english: Hold steady! Find its weakness and push through!

10869505.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
10869505.jp_real: 得体の知れない相手だが、負けはしない！
10869505.en_literal: I don't know what you are, but I won't lose!
10869505.english: It's horrifying, but we've survived far worse!

876168189.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
876168189.jp_real: この風、以前合体した時とは違う
876168189.en_literal: This wind... it's different from when we met before.
876168189.english: This wind is more sinister than I remember.

569568553.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A
569568553.jp_real: 迷っている場合ではないな
569568553.en_literal: This is no time to hesitate!
569568553.english: This is no time to waver!

712507991.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
712507991.jp_real: 俺たちが優勢だ！行けるぞ！
712507991.en_literal: We've got the upper hand! Let's go!
712507991.english: We have the upper hand! Now use it!

801074673.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_C
801074673.jp_real: 今だが勝負の分かれ目だ！
801074673.en_literal: Now's the time to decide the outcome!
801074673.english: Victory is at hand! Seize it!

959175101.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
959175101.jp_real: イド。彼は何を考えている。

802352369.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_A
802352369.jp_real: 素早い相手だが、捉えられぬわけでもない
802352369.english: Our foe is fast, but it's no match for us!

233313105.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_C
233313105.en_literal: Got a good grip on it!

662137552.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
662137552.jp_real: ガランツァ将軍に続くぞ！

780344958.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
780344958.jp_real: 同じ要領で、次も仕掛けるぞ！
780344958.en_literal: Same capacity, I'll set the next one too!
780344958.english: Your tricks will work no longer!

775801761.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B
775801761.jp_real: みんな、足場にだけは注意してくれ！
775801761.en_literal: Everyone, just be careful of the floor!

536017047.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
536017047.jp_real: この御言を読んで、我らは畏怖などしない！
536017047.en_literal: We summon this omen. We will not falter.
536017047.english: After all we've been through, we have nothing left to fear!

40138531.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
40138531.jp_real: 必ず食い止めてみせる！

594776146.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
594776146.en_literal: This time, I won't be late!

461854024.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
461854024.jp_real: リリス！貴様の企ててもここまでだ！

160843899.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
160843899.jp_real: 勝利の風は我らに吹いているぞ！
160843899.en_literal: The wind of victory blows for us!
160843899.english: The tailwind of victory guides us!

653027341.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
653027341.jp_real: アンラマイン！ここで破壊する！
653027341.en_literal: I won't allow it! I'll destroy you here!
653027341.english: Angra Mainyu! We will destroy you!

97055155.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
97055155.jp_real: 絆の力か…。なんと心地よく、力強い！
97055155.en_literal: Is this the power of bonds? How pleasant... and strong!
97055155.english: Unity shall guide us! Victory is assured!

689343398.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
689343398.jp_real: カミノケシンデアロートモオクシタリワシナイ
689343398.en_literal: Even if I am a manifestation of God, I will not yield!
689343398.english: We face destruction itself! But we shall not shrink!

849172191.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
849172191.jp_real: 攻め続けよう！それしかない！
849172191.en_literal: Let's keep pressing forward! That's our only option!
849172191.english: Continue the assault! We must prevail!

408740334.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
408740334.jp_real: ここが終局か…やるしかない！
408740334.en_literal: So this is the end... I have no choice but to do it!
408740334.english: One final challenge! Face it proudly!

324907401.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
324907401.jp_real: 我が双剣の神髄を見よ！
324907401.en_literal: Behold the essence of my swordsmanship!
324907401.english: Bear witness to the might of my twin fangs!

1033552866.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_B
1033552866.jp_real: さあ、このまま攻め続けるぞ！

610324560.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_5st_1_FIRST
610324560.jp_real: なんとしても、必ずここで！
610324560.en_literal: I must, I will, right here!

1028948888.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_1st_1_FIRST
1028948888.jp_real: 何が起きるか分からない。慎重に行こう。
1028948888.en_literal: I don't know what's going to happen. Let's be careful.
1028948888.english: Take heart, everyone. Who knows what lurks here?

782665371.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_A
782665371.en_literal: Got a firm grip on it!

978121239.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
978121239.jp_real: 参戦開始！敵に囲まれないよう注意を！
978121239.en_literal: Three times! Be careful not to get surrounded by enemies!
978121239.english: Open ranks! Don't let them flank us!

269652253.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
269652253.jp_real: もうりょうめ、われらのじゃまはさせねえぞ！
269652253.en_literal: I won't let you interfere with our plans!
269652253.english: They don't know who they've challenged! Show them!

719689067.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
719689067.jp_real: イストリアス殿の栄昇完了まで援護！敵を近づけるな！
719689067.en_literal: I'll cover for you until the Estorias Lord's victory is confirmed! Don't let the enemy get close!
719689067.english: Protect Historia! We must buy her time!

409892919.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
409892919.english: Stay focused on the path ahead!

833589754.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_C
833589754.en_literal: I'll show you what I'm made of!

492305945.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
492305945.jp_real: ゼーガグランデ！いい空域だと思うが！
492305945.en_literal: Zega Grande. I think it's a good area.
492305945.english: Sega Grande has its charms, but the battles...

1021705271.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
1021705271.jp_real: 束になって来ようとも！
1021705271.english: Send your strongest! It matters not!

90408363.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
90408363.en_literal: I'll get out of the way!

580114032.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
580114032.jp_real: シードホルム城を奪還する！
580114032.en_literal: I'll take back the Seed of Holmshjort!

700564610.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
700564610.jp_real: 何が相手であろうとも俺たちは！
700564610.en_literal: No matter who the opponent is, we'll...
700564610.english: Whatever darkness lies here, we shall face it!

215989899.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
215989899.english: I wage my honor as a knight!

609954320.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
609954320.jp_real: それにしても不気味な塔だ

864861780.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_B
864861780.en_literal: I still can't afford to be careless.

26452435.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_C
26452435.en_literal: Alright! Let's hurry to the back!

296552493.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_1
296552493.jp_real: みんな、いい連携だった！
296552493.en_literal: Everyone, that was a great link!

523059672.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_2
523059672.jp_real: いいコンビネーションだった

730356354.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3
730356354.jp_real: みんなの力があってこそだ！
730356354.english: Never was there a greater crew!

364006452.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_1
364006452.en_literal: Everyone, don't let your guard down!

209387337.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
209387337.jp_real: 俺たちの力、見せてやろ！
209387337.english: Come what may, we will prevail!

12302401.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_1
12302401.jp_real: ああ、息が合っていたな

364691641.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
364691641.english: Agreed! I felt proud of that one!

83848693.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_2
83848693.jp_real: ああ、このまま押し切るぞ！

1027502089.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
1027502089.jp_real: ローランドの、すごいな！
1027502089.english: Rolan, I'm at a loss for words.

719894802.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0300
719894802.en_literal: Support in the rear, thank you.

565028303.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0400
565028303.en_literal: That technique just now was amazing.

225585186.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0500
225585186.english: A tried and true veteran indeed!

355418241.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0600
355418241.jp_real: ありがとう、ロゼッタ殿。

59351064.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1000
59351064.jp_real: 相変わらずの才だな、パーシヴァル。
59351064.en_literal: Still the same old you, Percival.
59351064.english: Percival, as fierce a soldier as ever.

706484731.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100
706484731.jp_real: さすがです！ジークフリートさん！
706484731.english: You're in a class of your own.

916658515.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200
916658515.en_literal: I'm grateful to the woman of the blade.

651241946.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
651241946.jp_real: 開闘乱馬を立つとは、まさにこのことか！
651241946.en_literal: To stand against the ice king... this is exactly what I'm talking about!
651241946.english: Your sword could cut through the greatest boulder!

655782145.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1400
655782145.jp_real: 鋭い一閃、実に見事だった
655782145.english: Your sword moves too fast for the eye to follow.

970031101.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
970031101.jp_real: これが伝説の大剣豪の技か！
970031101.en_literal: So this is the technique of the legendary great swordsmen?
970031101.english: No wonder they tell legends about you.

664391449.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1600
664391449.jp_real: リンク支援に感謝する
664391449.en_literal: Thank you for the link support.

276084289.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1900
276084289.jp_real: 合わせてくれて助かったよ
276084289.en_literal: Thanks for syncing up. I owe you one.
276084289.english: I am grateful for the aid.

1031851532.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
1031851532.jp_real: 次も当てにさせてもらいます。シエテ殿。
1031851532.en_literal: I'll take the next hit for you, Seofon.
1031851532.english: May I have your aid on the next assault?

31654592.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
31654592.jp_real: 全空一の弓の支援、恐れいる
31654592.en_literal: Support from the bow in the sky, I'm counting on you.
31654592.english: The depth of your skill saves us yet again.

217304671.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
217304671.jp_real: 援護に感謝する！ガランツァ殿！
217304671.en_literal: I thank you for your support, Lord Gallanza.

414458058.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500
414458058.en_literal: Alright, let's prepare for what comes next.
414458058.english: We must prepare for the next fight!

663665090.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2600
663665090.jp_real: 感謝する！ベアトリクス殿！
663665090.english: Grateful to have your aid, Beatrix!

650085195.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2700
650085195.en_literal: That was a perfect follow-up attack.

1031005101.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
1031005101.jp_real: フラウドの援護に感謝
1031005101.en_literal: Flaude, thank you for the support!
1031005101.english: I thank you for your support.

473883219.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
473883219.jp_real: これが六竜の刻の力か
473883219.en_literal: So this is... the dark power of the Six Dragons?
473883219.english: The might of the wedge of darkness!

585728490.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0100
585728490.jp_real: 連携がうまくいったな

796233909.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0200
796233909.english: That could not have gone better.

375315724.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
375315724.english: It feels as if we're old comrades.

493910841.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0400
493910841.jp_real: ありがとう。いい支援だった。
493910841.en_literal: Thanks. That was a good support.

998368036.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
998368036.jp_real: まだ油断してはいけないな
998368036.en_literal: We can't afford to be careless yet.
998368036.english: We mustn't think we've won yet.

259447543.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
259447543.jp_real: 植物を使った攻撃か。実に面白い。
259447543.en_literal: Using plants for attacks, huh? How utterly fascinating.
259447543.english: I never thought wooden petal could hold up against frost and steel.

475326693.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
475326693.jp_real: 多数の手勢による波状攻撃か
475326693.en_literal: A barrage of attacks from numerous enemies?
475326693.english: I see. Attack in waves and wear down their defenses.

995080770.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0900
995080770.en_literal: I'm sorry. I'm glad you're okay.

418481027.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
418481027.english: Fighting side by side, just like the old days.

522114064.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
522114064.jp_real: フォローありがとうございます！

604422958.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1200
604422958.jp_real: シャルロッテ殿とは息が合うな。
604422958.en_literal: You're quite compatible with her, aren't you?

817177797.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
817177797.jp_real: 俺も負けていられないな
817177797.en_literal: I can't afford to lose either.
817177797.english: Perhaps I should redouble my training.

15993422.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
15993422.jp_real: 形がない！ガンダゴウザ殿！

271776881.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
271776881.english: Let us turn up the pressure!

223095033.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
223095033.jp_real: これがオーガマグロウノスの一撃か
223095033.en_literal: So this is the mighty Grounus's strike?

343079032.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
343079032.jp_real: 連金術には疎いが、相当に練り上げられているのはわかる
343079032.en_literal: I'm no expert on alchemy, but I can tell this is quite the concoction.
343079032.english: I am not versed in alchemy, but your power is unmistakable.

865573015.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2100
865573015.jp_real: なんとしなやかな一撃だ

611221341.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
611221341.jp_real: 紛れもなく最高の一撃でした
611221341.en_literal: That was a perfect strike, without a single flaw.

764284005.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
764284005.jp_real: 援護に感謝する、ソーン殿。
764284005.en_literal: I'm grateful for your support, Thorne.

194580371.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
194580371.jp_real: 分かってはいたが、改めて驚かされる領力だ。
194580371.en_literal: I knew it, but I'm still amazed at your power.
194580371.english: No matter how oft I bear witness, your strength is a sight to behold!

941560323.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
941560323.jp_real: ふむ、魔剣は何本まで操れるのだろうか。
941560323.en_literal: Hmph. How many cursed swords can you control?
941560323.english: May I ask how you control so many swords at once?

1068500127.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
1068500127.jp_real: ユーステス殿、追撃に感謝を！
1068500127.en_literal: Thanks for the follow-up attack, Eustace!
1068500127.english: Thank you for lending your assistance.

1063484003.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2800
1063484003.jp_real: なるほど。格闘術との連携は学びが多いな。
1063484003.en_literal: I see. There's a lot to learn from combining with martial arts.
1063484003.english: I've much to learn from fighting alongside a martial artist.

968839466.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
968839466.jp_real: フェディエル殿、女力に感謝を
968839466.en_literal: Fediel, thank you for your support.
968839466.english: Fediel, I thank you for your aid!

193111297.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C
193111297.jp_real: まだ気を抜かずにいこう

510405495.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
510405495.jp_real: 今のタイミングで合わせられるとは
510405495.en_literal: I can't believe we're syncing up at this timing.
510405495.english: It was like you read my mind!

359350219.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0100
359350219.en_literal: Looks like I'm being saved again.
359350219.english: I knew I could depend on you.

548398598.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0200
548398598.jp_real: カタリナ殿の技には、どこか通じるものを感じる。
548398598.en_literal: I sense something familiar in your techniques, Katalina.
548398598.english: There is much akin in our swordplay.

190287349.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
190287349.en_literal: Thanks. That was a big help.

167326276.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0400
167326276.en_literal: Io-dono, let's prepare for what comes next.
167326276.english: Keep your staff at the ready.

983000861.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0500
983000861.jp_real: オイゲン！ここだと思ったところに銃弾が飛んでくる！
983000861.en_literal: Amazing... I thought I was safe here, and bullets are flying everywhere.
983000861.english: Not a bullet missed its mark!

1007592981.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
1007592981.jp_real: まだ油断はできないな
1007592981.en_literal: I still can't afford to let my guard down.

1039352742.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
1039352742.jp_real: ユーレイの仲間がこんなに頼もしいとはな
1039352742.en_literal: I never thought a ghostly ally could be so reliable.
1039352742.english: Even the dead act with valor.

745409377.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
745409377.jp_real: ヴェイン、気を抜くなよ！

352915526.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
352915526.jp_real: 今の動きに合わせられたとは。
352915526.en_literal: I was able to match your movements just now.

961792636.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
961792636.jp_real: ジークフリートさんと共に戦えて光栄です！
961792636.en_literal: It's an honor to fight alongside you, Siegfried.
961792636.english: There is no honor greater than fighting by your side.

712732858.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1200
712732858.en_literal: Alright, let's prepare for the next one!
712732858.english: Come! We mustn't slow our pace!

4582116.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
4582116.jp_real: おれの二刀流、是非ともオキナに見定めてもらいたいものだ
4582116.en_literal: My two swords... I'd be honored if you'd witness them.
4582116.english: I'd like to hear what you think of my technique.

983830184.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
983830184.jp_real: 気を引き締めていこう

63122564.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
63122564.jp_real: 俺ももっと精進しなければな
63122564.en_literal: I need to be more focused too.
63122564.english: I've still got a long way to go.

733175993.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
733175993.jp_real: さらなる高みを目指さなければ！
733175993.en_literal: I must aim for even greater heights.
733175993.english: I need to improve my offense.

1011423301.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1700
1011423301.jp_real: 次はもっと精度を上げよう
1011423301.en_literal: Let's raise the accuracy next time.

995078108.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
995078108.en_literal: Alright, let's prepare for what comes next.
995078108.english: Come. There are still battles to be fought.

84637543.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
84637543.english: You are a born blade master.

939217639.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
939217639.jp_real: サンダルフォン、次も追撃を頼んでもいいか？
939217639.en_literal: Sandalphon, can I count on you for another barrage?
939217639.english: Sandalphon, are you ready for the next assault?

534229924.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
534229924.jp_real: よし！このまま攻勢をかける！
534229924.en_literal: Alright! Let's keep up the offensive!
534229924.english: Yes! We shall drive them back!

489477005.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
489477005.en_literal: Alright, let's prepare for what comes next!

676960055.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
676960055.jp_real: なんて豪快で正確な一撃なんだ！
676960055.en_literal: What a bold and accurate strike!
676960055.english: How are your strikes so ferocious yet precise?

762295569.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500
762295569.jp_real: 支援に感謝する！マギラフリラ殿！
762295569.en_literal: I'm grateful for your support, Maglielle.
762295569.english: Thank you for your aid, Lady Maglielle.

1045240760.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
1045240760.jp_real: いいスピードをしているな
1045240760.en_literal: You're moving at a good speed.

834043852.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
834043852.jp_real: ユーステス、刹那に開けた射線を逃さなかったか？
834043852.en_literal: You didn't miss that fleeting line of fire, did you?
834043852.english: You do not miss. Carry on.

560363041.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800
560363041.jp_real: 今のは完璧な連携だった！
560363041.english: A perfect display if ever there were!

642466774.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_2
642466774.en_literal: Leave the next one to me!

283460399.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
283460399.jp_real: あなたこそ、その洗練された剣、参考にさせてもらうよ。
283460399.en_literal: You too, let me take reference from your refined sword.
283460399.english: As do astrals. Well, I suppose that's obvious, isn't it?

142217465.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0100
142217465.en_literal: I won't let you get away with that.
142217465.english: It is my duty to protect you.

567447117.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
567447117.jp_real: それはこちらこそだ。カタリナ殿から学べることはとても多い。
567447117.en_literal: That's what I should be saying. There's so much I can learn from you, Katalina.
567447117.english: Yes. There's much we can learn from each other.

225115668.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
225115668.english: You would've done the same for me.

599788505.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0400
599788505.jp_real: 当然のことをしたまでだ
599788505.en_literal: I did what was only natural.
599788505.english: Not at all. We look out for each other.

811999633.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
811999633.jp_real: オイゲン殿もさすがの腕前だ
811999633.en_literal: Eugen, your skill is as impressive as ever.
811999633.english: I'd say the same about you, if I had a beard.

722336108.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0600
722336108.en_literal: No need to worry about it.

408886587.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0700
408886587.jp_real: 隙を逃すわけにはいかないからな
408886587.en_literal: I can't afford to miss this opening.

783781534.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
783781534.jp_real: ショウキは逃がさない！行こう！
783781534.en_literal: I won't let the opportunity slip away. Let's go!

991127533.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
991127533.jp_real: さらに速くなるというのか。だが、食らいついてみせる！
991127533.en_literal: You're saying you'll go even faster? I'll catch up to you!
991127533.english: Do you mean to test me? So be it!

681715637.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
681715637.jp_real: 何の？次も合わせて見せよ！
681715637.en_literal: What? Show me your next move too!

547611666.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
547611666.en_literal: I'll take the next one too!

403775684.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
403775684.jp_real: ならば、次は競争と行こう
403775684.en_literal: Then let's go to the next level of competition.
403775684.english: Hah! I won't say no to a challenge!

303166835.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
303166835.jp_real: バザラガ、戦い方が少しヴェインと似ていて、合わせやすいな。
303166835.en_literal: Your fighting style is a bit like Vane's, so we're easy to sync up.
303166835.english: Well, your fighting style does resemble Vayne's after all.

598636731.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
598636731.jp_real: ランスロット：カリオストロ、ノゾムトコロダ！

698814282.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900
698814282.jp_real: 仲間として当然のことをしたまでだ。
698814282.en_literal: I did what was only natural as a comrade.

12334116.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
12334116.jp_real: その褒め言葉、ありがたく受け取っておくよ。
12334116.english: Wow, coming from the supreme primarch himself, I am honored.

201853298.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
201853298.jp_real: シエテ殿に認められるとは、光栄です。
201853298.en_literal: To be acknowledged by you, Seofon... I'm honored.
201853298.english: It's an honor to have your trust, Seofon.

958642352.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
958642352.jp_real: そちらこそ、さすがは全空一の弓の使い手だ。
958642352.en_literal: You too. You're truly the number one archer in the sky.
958642352.english: Absurd. You're the greatest archer in the sky realm.

877328495.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
877328495.jp_real: スピードと早さは同じでは…と、とにかく、臨むところだ！
877328495.en_literal: Speed and swiftness are the same, aren't they? Anyway, I'm counting on you!
877328495.english: Our speed and swiftness not one and the same? No matter. Let us race!

891802325.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
891802325.jp_real: マケンの動きに合わせ、さらなる一閃を叩き込む！
891802325.en_literal: I'll sync my movements with your blade and strike an even fiercer blow!
891802325.english: Well, I am fortified by the support of your magicked blades!

1061826147.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
1061826147.jp_real: 承知した！ベアトリクス殿！

684341933.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
684341933.jp_real: 稲妻のごとく待ってみせよ
684341933.en_literal: Lightning-like, just you wait and see!
684341933.english: And you fry them to a crisp!

51210759.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
51210759.jp_real: フラーの連撃もなかなかのものだ
51210759.en_literal: Fraud's combo attacks are quite something.
51210759.english: A knight is only as skilled as his allies.

135120278.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
135120278.jp_real: 褒め言葉として受け取っておこう
135120278.en_literal: I'll take that as a compliment.
135120278.english: I shall take that as praise.

101288896.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B
101288896.jp_real: ああ、この調子で行こう！
101288896.en_literal: Ah, let's keep this momentum going!
101288896.english: No matter what dangers lie ahead, we'll be ready.

621466115.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_3
621466115.en_literal: Heh heh... you're quite the sight.

746696203.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
746696203.jp_real: 水臭いぞ、ローランドの。仲間同士じゃないか。
746696203.en_literal: You're all wet, Rolan. We're comrades, aren't we?
746696203.english: You're as good a jester as you are a soldier.

839183300.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0100
839183300.jp_real: 勢いづいてきたな、団長。
839183300.english: I see you still have strength left for humor.

883030541.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
883030541.jp_real: コウリノケンギデマケルワケニワイカナイカラナ
883030541.en_literal: I can't lose to you with my ice sword skills.
883030541.english: It came naturally. Our swordplay is so similar.

1072721682.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
1072721682.jp_real: 問題ない。このまま前衛は任せてもらおう。
1072721682.en_literal: No problem. I'll take the lead from here.
1072721682.english: Of course. Leave the close combat to me.

1031503412.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
1031503412.english: You're welcome to train with me anytime.

44866765.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
44866765.jp_real: オイゲン殿、人をからかうのもほどほどに願いたい。
44866765.en_literal: Eugen, I'd appreciate it if you'd refrain from teasing people too much.

63151818.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
63151818.jp_real: ロゼッタ殿がスキを作ってくれたおかげだ
63151818.en_literal: Thanks to you, Rosetta, for creating the opening.

1057677212.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
1057677212.jp_real: これも日々の鍛錬の成果だ！
1057677212.en_literal: It's all thanks to my daily training.
1057677212.english: Seems my training has paid off.

946595994.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900
946595994.jp_real: 気を抜くなよ、ヴェイン。
946595994.en_literal: Don't let your guard down, Vane.
946595994.english: It's not yet time to celebrate, Vane.

128024381.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
128024381.jp_real: ジークフリートさんのおかげです！

1032647515.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
1032647515.jp_real: 次もこの調子でいこう！
1032647515.english: Indeed. None can prevail against our might.

522606524.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
522606524.jp_real: これが、極みに至ったオキナの剣技。参考にさせてもらおう！
522606524.en_literal: This is the ultimate swordsmanship of the greatsword. Allow me to reference it.
522606524.english: Then I shall be your willing student.

724847386.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
724847386.jp_real: ガンダゴウザ殿のおかげだ
724847386.english: Truly, experience in the field guides us.

670128985.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
670128985.jp_real: チキセマルトハマサニコノコトカ
670128985.en_literal: So this is what it means to be a true commander.
670128985.english: I suspect this is why people fear you.

487716789.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
487716789.jp_real: ああ、一瞬の油断が命取りだからな。
487716789.en_literal: Ah... a moment's carelessness could cost you your life.
487716789.english: I know. A single moment can mean life or death.

820046618.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
820046618.jp_real: えっ、興味があるなら手ほどきしても構わないが？
820046618.en_literal: If you're interested, I don't mind letting you have it.
820046618.english: Would you like me to teach you?

280800655.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
280800655.jp_real: ふっ、何度でも合わせてみせるさ。
280800655.en_literal: Heh. I'll show you how to sync up with me any number of times.
280800655.english: And they never shall so long as I have any say in the matter.

282851304.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
282851304.jp_real: これくらい、お安い御用です！
282851304.en_literal: That's about it. It's quite a bargain.

1023815851.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
1023815851.jp_real: ああ、次も必ず決めてみせる！
1023815851.en_literal: I'll definitely land the next one too!
1023815851.english: Of course! I shall hold nothing back!

249771910.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
249771910.jp_real: 我が双剣にも引けを取らないことを証明しなければな！
249771910.en_literal: I must prove that my swordsmanship is no less than yours.
249771910.english: I fear I still have much to prove with these dual blades of mine.

827135709.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
827135709.en_literal: I won't let you get away with that!

1032605714.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2700
1032605714.jp_real: まだまだ修行中の身さ
1032605714.en_literal: You're still a trainee, aren't you?
1032605714.english: We've still further heights to climb.

714441352.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
714441352.jp_real: フェンドラヘの名にかけて、失態は許されない！
714441352.en_literal: I swear on the name of Phaedra, failure is not an option!
714441352.english: I will not falter, lest I besmirch Fiendrock's good name.

23742367.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
23742367.jp_real: その名に恥じぬよう、精進を続けると、この剣に誓おう！
23742367.en_literal: I shall not disgrace that name. I will continue to strive. I swear it on this sword!
23742367.english: It's a lofty title, but one to which I must endeavor.

308417214.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_3
308417214.english: Yes. Focus on the dangers ahead.

67062147.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
67062147.jp_real: ああ、気合を入れて行こう！
67062147.english: Let us bring peace to the skies together.

470814860.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0100
470814860.jp_real: 背中は俺が守る。思いっきり行ってこい！
470814860.en_literal: I'll cover your back. Go for it with everything you've got!
470814860.english: Don't worry, this is pacing myself.

735760265.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
735760265.jp_real: どうかんだな。訓練ならばいつでも付き合う。
735760265.en_literal: You're a good comrade. If it's training, I'll always be there for you.
735760265.english: I'd be honored to train together when there's time.

364095821.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
364095821.jp_real: ラカム殿。このまま調子を上げていこう！
364095821.en_literal: Rackam-dono, let's keep the momentum going!
364095821.english: Let's perfect this stratagem as we go.

636821070.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
636821070.jp_real: ああ、光栄はイオ殿に任せよ。
636821070.en_literal: Ah, leave the honor to you, Io.
636821070.english: Indeed. The rearguard is safe with you.

168394299.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
168394299.jp_real: 承知した！この双剣で期待に応えよう！
168394299.en_literal: Understood. I'll meet your expectations with this sword.
168394299.english: Does the river freeze by winter's kiss?

220629623.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
220629623.jp_real: ムロンだ！俺が先陣を切ろう！
220629623.en_literal: Of course. I'll clear the path ahead!
220629623.english: I'd be honored to coordinate another attack.

799906254.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
799906254.english: I will keep the crew safe.

742275464.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
742275464.jp_real: 頼りにしているからな
742275464.english: With you around, I can take on anything!

791246678.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
791246678.jp_real: おれがそんなヘマをするとでも？
791246678.en_literal: Heh heh... You think I'd make such a rookie mistake?
791246678.english: Come now, we're old brothers in arms.

366053850.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
366053850.jp_real: はい！常に学び、成長せねば！
366053850.english: Thank you. I'll work hard to meet your expectations.

18215327.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
18215327.jp_real: 我らが騎士道、ここに示したり！
18215327.en_literal: We knights of the realm shall show you!
18215327.english: Now's the time to fulfill our oaths and prove our valor!

890682845.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
890682845.jp_real: 確かにな。今度、訓練課程に釣りを加えてみるか。
890682845.en_literal: You're right. Next time, let's add fishing to the training regimen.
890682845.english: True. Perhaps I should take up the rod.

85126188.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
85126188.jp_real: ナルメア、殿こそ見事だった！
85126188.english: You are no less honorable than I, Narmaya.

793736622.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
793736622.jp_real: このやり方が、俺の剣に向いているからな。
793736622.english: My swords are rather like stingers, aren't they?

286897386.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
286897386.jp_real: 炎と氷の連携は慣れている
286897386.en_literal: I'm used to the combination of flame and ice.
286897386.english: I've had practice fighting with flame wielders.

163070100.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
163070100.jp_real: 常在戦場、抜かりはない！

120451851.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2100
120451851.jp_real: ああ、遠慮は無用だ、サンダルフォン。
120451851.en_literal: Ah, no need to hold back, Sandalphon.

1007053660.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
1007053660.en_literal: Heh. If that's what you wish.
1007053660.english: There can be no mercy on the battlefield.

263970614.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
263970614.jp_real: 騎空士としての連携には慣れてるからな。次も任せてくれ。
263970614.en_literal: As a knight, I'm used to working together. Leave the next one to me.
263970614.english: A knight must work in concert with his allies. I can offer you that much at least.

331093348.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
331093348.jp_real: ガランツァ殿、味方となると頼もしい限りだ。
331093348.en_literal: Gallanza-dono, you're reliable as an ally.
331093348.english: How heartening that you are now our ally.

1057552311.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
1057552311.jp_real: 承知した。マギラフリラ殿。

903415306.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
